input.background: Calculate the standard deviations of the batches of numbers provided in different units (years, months, days) and determine which batch has the greatest variability.
input.question: Calculate the standard deviations of the batches of numbers here.

output.answer: The standard deviations are $s_1=1$ year, $s_2=12$ months, and $s_3=365$ days, respectively.

batch_years.value: Values of the batch in years (specific values not provided in the problem statement)
batch_years.description: A batch of numbers measured in years for which the standard deviation needs to be calculated.

batch_months.value: Values of the batch in months (specific values not provided in the problem statement)
batch_months.description: A batch of numbers measured in months for which the standard deviation needs to be calculated.

batch_days.value: Values of the batch in days (specific values not provided in the problem statement)
batch_days.description: A batch of numbers measured in days for which the standard deviation needs to be calculated.

meta_info.caption: Units of measure changes numeric values of a standard deviation.
